Imbued Golden Plains Earring  
 


Slot: EAR
STR: -3 STA: +2 WIS: +4
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Deity: Karana
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

STR: -3 STA: +2 WIS: +4
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY

Race: ALL

My Erstwhile Chanter Stonecrafter has a bag of these for sale on Drinal. /tell me in game or mail irtuk@throneofdrinal.com

safe hunting all.
▲ Page top
What is the trivial rating or range?
QuoteReply
# Dec 25 2001 at 2:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252820786
10 posts
I have a 10 Gn Enchie alt working towards 70 Jewlery skill, not good enough for Gold yet, but soon hopefully :) Any info on the trivial rating/range for electrum/gold/plat would be appriciated :)
▲ Page top
Wis Caster Setup
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2001 at 1:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780881775
1,154 posts
If you are a Wis caster, or even a Hybrid that could use some more Wisdom, there is a Moderatly expensive but Crafted (so easily found) set.
Ear 1 - Imbued Golden Plains Earring
Ear 2 - Imbued Golden Plains Earring
Face - Plat/Velium Ruby Veil
Although expensive this combo, like I said, is easily attainable and ends up with a good attribute enhancement:
+4 Sta, + 15-16 Wis (Veil), +1-2 Strength (Veil)
The Sta is no woopdido and the Strenght is pathetic (but at least its not negative)... but the Wis is increadable for 3 slots...
▲ Page top
hrmm
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2001 at 6:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245715618
5 posts
sheesh i kinda wish it wall all plusses, being a ranger we could use the strength, but ah vell, good for druids eh?
▲ Page top
Clerics can imbue
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2001 at 3:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762024263
51 posts
I'm pretty sure Karana clerics can imbue these as well.

And as with all cultural jewelery I've tried, the fail rate is extremely low. At 209 skill I've attempted 6 of these plains earings, all successful. have 200 int and 255 dex (if that matters). Gave to friends.

Tribunal "cash cow" earrings have same sucess rate, and sell for more. Kinda easy to target the Tribunal wisdom casters, they are all tall :)

Me, I'm an enchanter of Innoruuk, I get royally screwed when it comes to cultural jewelery. But thems the breaks.


▲ Page top
RE: Clerics can imbue
QuoteReply
# Sep 29 2001 at 12:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361349566
43 posts

__DEL__1591762024263

I'm pretty sure Karana clerics can imbue these as well.

And as with all cultural jewelery I've tried, the fail rate is extremely low. At 209 skill I've attempted 6 of these plains earings, all successful. Gave to friends.

Tribunal "cash cow" earrings have same sucess rate, and sell for more. Kinda easy to target the Tribunal wisdom casters, they are all tall :)

Me, I'm an enchanter of Innoruuk, I get royally screwed when it comes to cultural jewelery. But thems the breaks.

Ingredients
QuoteReply
# May 03 2001 at 7:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1596385396172
1 post
What are all of the ingredients for this?
▲ Page top
RE: Ingredients
QuoteReply
# May 10 2001 at 10:32 AM Rating: Decent
Bofor
Scholar
326 posts
1 enchanted gold bar (enchanter) & 1 imbued plains pebble (druid or cleric of Karana) in a jewelry kit.
____________________________
Bo knows jewelry.
▲ Page top
RE: Ingredients
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2001 at 11:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763464591
16 posts
ROFL Bofor, thank you for bringing up Bo! I, if not anyone else, thoroughly enjoyed that trip down memory lane. Very nice. )
▲ Page top
Not to Bad, Not to hard to make either
QuoteReply
# Apr 25 2001 at 4:12 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
One more WIS is worth it on EAR slot - here's why:

Most of our Kunark Armor is stat-less but good for clicks, so it is good to max out wis in the none armor slots. Also, WIS items are freakin expensive trying to get to 200, Reed Belt, Ceno Belt, GEB's, etc cost 10k+. And what druid is worried about STR? Humans and Half Elfs can worship Karana as well, so clerics are also candidates. Besides, Forest Loops cost too much - its same wis as gold jasper. These are nice. I have 4 for sale on Terris Thule by the way.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 04 2001 at 8:19 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Is Verant out of their mind? Compared to a forest loop, who would use this? Who would give up the AC and take the str hit all for the sake of 1 wis? Bah. Once again, we druids take a hit. Give us good jewelry like they did the barbarians!

hello, i just bought one tonight for 200 plat, i think its worth it, forest loop is like 800, you get one more wisdom for plains pebble, when i told my guild, they wanted to know where they could get one. He was originally selling for 300, but 2 was all I had. Its good! Get one!
